├─ BG     (Sprite 164x111, frame=c318d4d3…@f9941)
└─ Symbol (Sprite 53x50)

|---|---|---|

| 1 | e5148d4a | Multiplier |
| 2 | 363972ec | Upgrade |
| 3 | 07f31a38 | SymbolConvert |
| 4 | c318d4d3 | GrandJP |

## 要討論的點（先不動碼）

1. **prefab 怎麼進場**：(a) 預先把這塊放進 `Node_FeatureWheel.prefab` 場景樹、用 `@property(Node)` 連好引用，顯示/隱藏即可（最簡單、最適合「暫代」）；還是 (b) 存 `@property(Prefab)`、runtime `instantiate` + `addChild`？

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

  <learned>FeatureWheelResult prefab contains self-contained result display card with background and symbol sprite; SpriteChange component's 5 frames directly align with TYPE_ICON_CONFIG indices allowing reuse of TypeToIconIndex logic from BindSegmentIcons; current landing animation (0.36s total) has no connection to landed feature type; potential sprite asset issue where index 4 (GrandJP) shares same UUID (c318d4d3) as BG sprite</learned>

  <notes>Implementation is blocked pending design decisions, not technical constraints; all pieces already exist (prefab, sprite mapping, landing index) and can be wired together once approach is confirmed; maintaining BC-7 contract (animation completes before promise resolves) is critical for callback timing</notes>
</summary>

|\\n\\n對應 `.claude-loop/learning-log.md`（per-session 工作記憶）的關係：\\n\\n```\\nlearning-log.md（短期 / session 內）\\n    ↓ Phase 5 verifier 升格檢查\\n    ↓ 同類根因 ≥ 3 次 + 用戶確認\\n長期警惕模式（長期 / 跨閉環，本檔案上半段）\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 長期警惕模式\\n\\n> 從 learning-log 累積升格的高頻問題模式。每次閉環 Phase 1 前 architect **必讀**——這些是過去踩過 ≥ 3 次的坑。\\n\\n### 升格條件\\n\\n- learning-log 中同類根因累積 ≥ 3 次\\n- Phase 5 verifier 提示後用戶確認升格\\n- 升格後 learning-log 對應條目加註「→ 已升格 #XXX」\\n\\n### 降級機制（v6.4.0 新增 · 升格對稱）\\n\\n> 升格 = 永久 active 的假設可能在大樣本中失效。本機制允許「失去現實證據」的條目從 active 退場，避免污染 Phase 1 教訓查詢。\\n\\n**降級觸發條件**：\\n- **A 級降級**：升格後 **n = 10** 個閉環無新證據（即無 learning-log 新條目加註「→ 已升格 #XXX」）→ 條目降為「條件式紀律」\\n- **完全 archive**：A 級降級後再 **n** 個閉環（累計 2n = 20）仍無新證據 → 條目移到「歷史條目」\\n\\n**降級動作**：\\n- A 級：條目標 `⏸️ 條件式` 從 `## 長期警惕模式` 移到末尾 `## 條件式紀律` section，補上「觸發條件」欄位\\n- 完全 archive：條目移到 `## 歷史條目` section，標 `🗄️ archived YYYY-MM-DD · 升格 → 條件式 → archived`\\n\\n**降級執行者**：Phase 5 verifier step 9d 偵測候選 → 主 agent 在 Part C 用 AskUserQuestion 確認。\\n\\n**復發處理**（EH-2）：「條件式紀律」section 內條目在 **m = 5** 個閉環內被 learning-log 命中 ≥ 2 次 → 立即升回 `## 長期警惕模式`（無需用戶確認 — 已有歷史升格背書，verifier 強制偵測）。直接「命中 1 次就升回」過敏感，m=5 + 2 次門檻過濾偶然性。\\n\\n**範圍限縮**（EH-3）：種子條目（標「種子條目（外部來源）」或「升格自 0 筆 learning-log」者）**不適用降級規則**。\\n\\n### 條目格式\\n\\n```markdown\\n### #XXX · YYYY-MM-DD · 升格自 N 筆 learning-log · #tag1 #tag2\\n\\n- **模式**：[一句話描述高頻問題類型]\\n- **觸發情境**：[何時容易發生這個問題，具體情境而非抽象詞]\\n- **預防做法**：[Phase 1 設計時要做什麼，可操作的指令或檢查]\\n- **檢測信號**：[Phase 3 審查 / Phase 5 自證時要看什麼]\\n- **歷史證據**：[列出 N 個 learning-log 條目的時間戳] → 完整內容見 .claude-loop/learning-log.md\\n```\\n\\n### 模式記錄\\n\\n#### #001 · 2026-04-18 · 種子條目（reel_core 案外部來源） · #無驗證宣告 #診斷紀律\\n\\n- **模式**：絕對負面陳述缺證據（Existence Claim Without Verification）\\n- **觸發情境**：診斷「A 找不到 B」「X 不存在」「Y 缺失」「Z 為空」類問題時，agent 基於架構推理或直覺下結論，未實際執行 `ls` / `grep` / `find` / `test` 驗證\\n- **預防做法**：Phase 1 根因敘述中的任何絕對負面陳述（不存在 / 沒有 / 缺 / 找不到 / 為空 / 未呼叫 / 未實作）必須附產生該結論的指令輸出。無證據時須降格為「推論（未驗證）：X 可能不存在。驗證指令：ls X」\\n- **檢測信號**：Phase 3 code-reviewer 掃 Phase 1 根因段落，觸發字（不存在/沒有/缺/找不到/為空）出現但同段落無 ls/grep/find/test 指令輸出 → R-x high\\n- **歷史證據**：種子條目（外部來源 `閉環學習素材-存在性宣告缺證據.md` 2026-04-18）→ 待 learning-log 累積實際命中後補充時間戳\\n\\n#### #002 · 2026-04-18 · 種子條目（reel_core 案外部來源） · #routing誤分類 #診斷紀律\\n\\n- **模式**：存在 vs 路徑 框架錯置（Existence-vs-Routing Mis-framing）\\n- **觸發情境**：處理「A 讀不到 B」類 bug 時，將 routing 問題（B 在別處存在但 A 找錯位置）誤當作 existence 問題（B 真的不存在），導致修法朝錯方向（補資料 vs 修路徑）\\n- **預防做法**：Phase 1 根因分析「A 讀不到 B」類 bug 時，必須先用 `find`（或等價全域搜尋）確認 B 是否存在於任何位置。三種分類強制標明：\\n  - B 在別處存在 → **routing 問題**，修 A 的查找路徑（env var / cwd / config）\\n  - B 絕對不存在 → **existence 問題**，補資料 / 生成 B\\n  - B 找得到但讀不了 → **access 問題**，修權限 / 格式 / 版本\\n- **檢測信號**：Phase 1 設計規格 / Phase 3 審查時，同主體同時出現「X 不存在」與「X 存在於 Y」 → 框架錯置嫌疑，要求 reframe 為 routing\\n- **歷史證據**：種子條目（外部來源 `閉環學習素材-存在性宣告缺證據.md` 2026-04-18，UK 658 reel_core panic 案）→ 待 learning-log 累積實際命中後補充時間戳\\n\\n#### #003 · 2026-04-22 · 種子條目（GS 誤判事件外部來源） · #認知性 #確認偏誤 #單線索推論\\n\\n- **模式**：單線索 → 事實（Single-Source Inference to Asserted Fact）\\n- **觸發情境**：讀到 config / workflow 中的單一線索（例：某 IP 出現在某 entry），立即斷言為事實（「這個 IP 是 GS」）。一旦假設形成，後續所有證據都往「支持此假設」方向解讀，形成確認偏誤。並把推論寫入 memory 污染未來 session\\n- **預防做法**：Phase 1 架構師 Step 0a（字面證據掃描）+ Step 0b（共用值檢測）先於任何推論。任何「X 是 Y」類斷言必須有 ≥ 1 A 級字面證據；共用值 N ≥ 3 時不得斷言為專屬資源。memory 寫入前須標注 evidence_level，弱證據禁寫入 `type: project` memory\\n- **檢測信號**：Phase 1 設計規格中出現「某 X 是某 Y」類斷言但 Step 0a 輸出為空或實際涉及環境事實卻標「不適用」→ Phase 1b design-reviewer DR-x high。Phase 5 verifier 比對設計事實引用是否有 A 級證據，弱證據 → V-x high\\n- **歷史證據**：種子條目（外部來源 `經驗反思-GS誤判-2026-04-22.md` 2026-04-22，pig_server GS 誤判事件）→ 待 learning-log 累積實際命中後補充時間戳\\n\\n#### #004 · 2026-04-22 · 種子條目（GS 誤判事件外部來源） · #認知性 #字面證據 #self-declaration\\n\\n- **模式**：忽視字面證據（Ignored Literal Evidence）\\n- **觸發情境**：讀到檔名明寫用途（`PypiConfig.cfg`、`SaltMaster.yml`）或檔內 echo/print 字串（`echo \\\"no pig pkg found on pypi server\\\"`），但推論走向相反結論（「這個 IP 跑 GS」），將作者的 self-declaration 當成裝飾\\n- **預防做法**：Phase 1 Step 0a 強制三層字面掃描（檔名 token + docstring + echo/print 字串）。**A 級證據規則**：字面證據（self-declaration）是 A 級，間接推論（如「workflow SSH 到這個 IP」）是 B 級；A 與 B 衝突時默認以 A 為準，B 降為「待查證」\\n- **檢測信號**：Phase 1 設計規格中推論涉及的檔案，其檔名 token / docstring / 字串常數指向不同用途但設計未說明此衝突 → Phase 1b DR-x high（要求補 Step 0a 說明或撤回推論）\\n- **歷史證據**：種子條目（外部來源 `經驗反思-GS誤判-2026-04-22.md` 2026-04-22，R2 根因）→ 待 learning-log 累積實際命中後補充時間戳\\n\\n#### #005 · 2026-04-22 · 種子條目（GS 誤判事件外部來源） · #認知性 #共用值 #N≥3\\n\\n- **模式**：共用值私有化（Shared-Value Privatization）\\n- **觸發情境**：config / 資料檔中某 value（IP / URL / 路徑 / 埠號）出現在多個 entry（≥ 3 次），卻推論為某一方的專屬資源（「這個 IP 是 pig 的 GS」）。違反「一個專屬資源不可能同時屬於多方」的基本邏輯\\n- **預防做法**：Phase 1 Step 0b 強制全域出現次數檢查。value 出現 ≥ 3 次 → 判為共用資源（pypi / DNS / Salt Master / 監控 / 共用 DB），設計不可推論為某 entry 專屬；≥ 5 次直接視為共享基礎設施\\n- **檢測信號**：設計規格中出現「某 IP / URL / 服務是某模組專屬」但同 config 中此 value 出現 ≥ 3 次 → Phase 1b DR-x high（推論與共用值衝突）。Phase 5 verifier 對環境事實引用做 Step 0b 回溯掃描\\n- **歷史證據**：種子條目（外部來源 `經驗反思-GS誤判-2026-04-22.md` 2026-04-22，R3 根因）→ 待 learning-log 累積實際命中後補充時間戳\\n\\n#### #006 · 2026-04-26 · 升格自 3 筆 learning-log · #行數預算 #judgment_failure\\n\\n- **模式**：CLAUDE_TEMPLATE / 主檔行數預算估算樂觀導致緩衝不足\\n- **觸發情境**：major / minor 升級含「結構化 metadata 區塊（migration-notes / anchors / config）」「表格展開」「Section 子段拆分」時，P1 預算只算 line-by-line 不算區塊整體展開（head + body + 3-5 個 sub-section 一個區塊就 15-20 行）\\n- **預防做法**：(a) P1 設計時對結構化區塊單獨估 ≥ 15-20 行（不能當「條目」單行算）；(b) Phase 1b design-reviewer 步驟 4 行數預算審查強制 wc -l 主檔當前行數 + 預估增量，**不信任設計者寫的「+N 行」自評**；(c) 預算緩衝 ≥ 5 行硬規則（沿用 v6.0.0 教訓 #2 確立）\\n- **檢測信號**：Phase 1b 步驟 4 預算審查時 wc -l 對比；Phase 3 / 精簡閉環步驟 3 wc -l 比對預算；緩衝 < 5 → 標 R-x medium 預算審查；超出上限 → 標 R-x high 觸發回退\\n- **歷史證據**：v6.0.0 教訓 #2 (575 緩衝 6 → DR-3 標 arch-risk) + v6.0.0 教訓 #3 (550 緩衝 1 → DR-1v2 medium 次生副作用) + v6.2.0 R-1 (545 超 18 → 步驟 3 high 回退) → 完整內容見 `.claude-loop/learning-log.md` 對應時間戳條目\\n\\n#### #007 · 2026-05-05 · 升格自 3 筆 learning-log · #認知性 #self-review #cross-source #依賴表盲區\\n\\n- **模式**：Single-Perspective Self-Review Blind Spot——執行者對自己工作的審查有系統性盲點，不論「執行者」是 LLM、session、還是同 session 累積多步操作，self-review 都會漏看自己沒主動檢查的維度\\n- **觸發情境**：(a) 對「方法論 / 評分 / 評估」類認知性產出做自我審查（cc_recommand vs codex 類） / (b) 接續執行跨 session 計畫時預設信任前 session 寫的計畫前提（不重審動機） / (c) 累積多 commit 工作完成時沒主動跑 CLAUDE.md 依賴表 walk（不檢查同步義務） / (d) LLM 自評「我做的這套方法論 / 評估很好」類陳述（無外部 baseline）\\n- **預防做法**：(a) 對「方法論評估 / 計畫前提 / 自評」類認知性產出，不能 single-source 拍板——至少需 cross-LLM review、人類校準、或同 LLM 不同 session 盲評其一；(b) 多 commit 工作完成時主動跑「依賴表 walk」——對每個改動位置查 CLAUDE.md 依賴表所有適用列（特別是第 11 列版本同步 + 第 8 列認知驗證層 + 第 9 列 .claudedocs 增刪）；(c) 接續跨 session 計畫時開工前必跑 architect Step 0a 對「計畫的核心前提」做字面證據掃描——前提是基於什麼證據？(d) 自評類產出在 Section 12 事實主張閘門中視為 B 級證據（單來源），標註「待 cross-source 驗證」\\n- **檢測信號**：Phase 1 architect 設計引用「之前 session 的計畫」「我之前評估過」類來源 → 需附 cross-source 驗證否則 DR-x medium；Phase 5 verifier 對「方法論 / 自評 / review」類認知性產出無 cross-source 證據 → V-x high；用戶提示「奇怪 / 不對 / 漏了什麼」類質疑 → Section 13 質疑熔斷協議觸發 + 強制 walk 依賴表標記同步遺漏 → 找出 R-x medium 條目\\n- **歷史證據**：2026-05-04 cc_recommand 自評本專案 83.8 漏看 5 個 bug，codex 跨 LLM 視角補回（cross-LLM） + 2026-05-05 早段接續階段 3「拆分 CLAUDE_TEMPLATE Section 12/13」計畫前未審查動機前提（cross-session same LLM） + 2026-05-05 晚段 7 commit 後沒主動跑依賴表第 11 列「版本變更要同步 3 處」+ 用戶質疑「奇怪」時我列 6 H 假設全沒命中真因（intra-session same LLM）→ 完整內容見 `.claude-loop/learning-log.md` 對應時間戳條目\\n\\n---\",\"stderr\":\"\",\"interrupted\":false,\"isImage\":false,\"noOutputExpected\":false}"</outcome>

提示後用戶確認升格\\n- 升格後 learning-log 對應條目加註「→ 已升格 #XXX」\\n\\n### 降級機制（v6.4.0 新增 · 升格對稱）\\n\\n> 升格 = 永久 active 的假設可能在大樣本中失效。本機制允許「失去現實證據」的條目從 active 退場，避免污染 Phase 1 教訓查詢。\\n\\n**降級觸發條件**：\\n- **A 級降級**：升格後 次門檻過濾偶然性。\\n\\n**範圍限縮**（EH-3）：種子條目（標「種子條目（外部來源）」或「升格自 0 筆 learning-log」者）**不適用降級規則**。\\n\\n### 條目格式\\n\\n```markdown\\n### #XXX · YYYY-MM-DD · 升格自 N 筆 learning-log · #tag1 #tag2\\n\\n- .claude-loop/learning-log.md\\n```\\n\\n### 模式記錄\\n\\n#### #001 · 2026-04-18 · 種子條目（reel_core 案外部來源） · #無驗證宣告 #診斷紀律\\n\\n- **模式**：絕對負面陳述缺證據（Existence Claim Without Verification）\\n- **觸發情境**：診斷「A 找不到 B」「X 不存在」「Y 缺失」「Z 為空」類問題時，agent 基於架構推理或直覺下結論，未實際執行 `ls` / `grep` / `find` / `test` 驗證\\n- **預防做法**：Phase 1 根因敘述中的任何絕對負面陳述（不存在 / 沒有 / 缺 / 找不到 / 為空 / 未呼叫 / 未實作）必須附產生該結論的指令輸出。無證據時須降格為「推論（未驗證）：X 可能不存在。驗證指令：ls X」\\n- **檢測信號**：Phase 3 code-reviewer 掃 Phase 1 根因段落，觸發字（不存在/沒有/缺/找不到/為空）出現但同段落無 ls/grep/find/test 指令輸出 → R-x high\\n- **歷史證據**：種子條目（外部來源 `閉環學習素材-存在性宣告缺證據.md` 2026-04-18）→ 待 learning-log 累積實際命中後補充時間戳\\n\\n#### #002 · 2026-04-18 · 種子條目（reel_core 案外部來源） · #routing誤分類 #診斷紀律\\n\\n- **模式**：存在 vs 路徑 框架錯置（Existence-vs-Routing Mis-framing）\\n- **觸發情境**：處理「A 讀不到 B」類 bug 時，將 routing 問題（B 在別處存在但 A 找錯位置）誤當作 existence 問題（B 真的不存在），導致修法朝錯方向（補資料 vs 修路徑）\\n- **預防做法**：Phase 1 根因分析「A 讀不到 B」類 bug 時，必須先用 `find`（或等價全域搜尋）確認 B 是否存在於任何位置。三種分類強制標明：\\n  - B 在別處存在 → **routing 問題**，修 A 的查找路徑（env var / cwd / config）\\n  - B 絕對不存在 → **existence 問題**，補資料 / 生成 B\\n  - B 找得到但讀不了 → **access 問題**，修權限 / 格式 / 版本\\n- **檢測信號**：Phase 1 設計規格 / Phase 3 審查時，同主體同時出現「X 不存在」與「X 存在於 Y」 → 框架錯置嫌疑，要求 reframe 為 routing\\n- **歷史證據**：種子條目（外部來源 `閉環學習素材-存在性宣告缺證據.md` 2026-04-18，UK 658 reel_core panic 案）→ 待 learning-log 累積實際命中後補充時間戳\\n\\n#### #003 · 2026-04-22 · 種子條目（GS 誤判事件外部來源） · #認知性 #確認偏誤 #單線索推論\\n\\n- **模式**：單線索 → 事實（Single-Source Inference to Asserted Fact）\\n- **觸發情境**：讀到 config / workflow 中的單一線索（例：某 IP 出現在某 entry），立即斷言為事實（「這個 IP 是 GS」）。一旦假設形成，後續所有證據都往「支持此假設」方向解讀，形成確認偏誤。並把推論寫入 memory 污染未來 session\\n- **預防做法**：Phase 1 架構師 Step 0a（字面證據掃描）+ Step 0b（共用值檢測）先於任何推論。任何「X 是 Y」類斷言必須有 ≥ 1 A 級字面證據；共用值 N ≥ 3 時不得斷言為專屬資源。memory 寫入前須標注 evidence_level，弱證據禁寫入 `type: project` memory\\n- **檢測信號**：Phase 1 設計規格中出現「某 X 是某 Y」類斷言但 Step 0a 輸出為空或實際涉及環境事實卻標「不適用」→ Phase 1b design-reviewer DR-x high。Phase 5 verifier 比對設計事實引用是否有 A 級證據，弱證據 → V-x high\\n- **歷史證據**：種子條目（外部來源 `經驗反思-GS誤判-2026-04-22.md` 2026-04-22，pig_server GS **觸發情境**：讀到檔名明寫用途（`PypiConfig.cfg`、`SaltMaster.yml`）或檔內 echo/print 字串（`echo \\\"no pig pkg found on pypi server\\\"`），但推論走向相反結論（「這個 IP 跑 GS」），將作者的 self-declaration 當成裝飾\\n- **預防做法**：Phase 1 Step 0a 強制三層字面掃描（檔名 token + docstring + echo/print 字串）。**A 級證據規則**：字面證據（self-declaration）是 A 級，間接推論（如「workflow SSH 到這個 IP」）是 B 級；A 與 B 衝突時默認以 A 為準，B 降為「待查證」\\n- **檢測信號**：Phase 1 設計規格中推論涉及的檔案，其檔名 token / docstring / 字串常數指向不同用途但設計未說明此衝突 → Phase 1b DR-x high（要求補 Step 0a 說明或撤回推論）\\n- **歷史證據**：種子條目（外部來源 `經驗反思-GS誤判-2026-04-22.md` 2026-04-22，R2 根因）→ 待 learning-log 累積實際命中後補充時間戳\\n\\n#### #005 · 2026-04-22 · 種子條目（GS 誤判事件外部來源） · #認知性 #共用值 #N≥3\\n\\n- **模式**：共用值私有化（Shared-Value Privatization）\\n- **觸發情境**：config / 資料檔中某 value（IP / URL / 路徑 / 埠號）出現在多個 entry（≥ 3 次），卻推論為某一方的專屬資源（「這個 IP 是 pig 的 服務是某模組專屬」但同 config 中此 value 出現 ≥ 3 次 → Phase 1b DR-x high（推論與共用值衝突）。Phase 5 verifier 對環境事實引用做 Step 0b 回溯掃描\\n- **歷史證據**：種子條目（外部來源 `經驗反思-GS誤判-2026-04-22.md` 2026-04-22，R3 根因）→ 待 learning-log 累積實際命中後補充時間戳\\n\\n#### #006 · 2026-04-26 · 升格自 3 筆 learning-log · #行數預算 #judgment_failure\\n\\n- **模式**：CLAUDE_TEMPLATE / 主檔行數預算估算樂觀導致緩衝不足\\n- **觸發情境**：major / minor 升級含「結構化 metadata Spot——執行者對自己工作的審查有系統性盲點，不論「執行者」是 LLM、session、還是同 session 累積多步操作，self-review 都會漏看自己沒主動檢查的維度\\n- **觸發情境**：(a) 對「方法論 / 評分 / 評估」類認知性產出做自我審查（cc_recommand vs codex 類） / (b) 接續執行跨 session 計畫時預設信任前 session   <subtitle>PlayLandAnnounce is called once at line 317, uses ANNOUNCE_SCALE/TIME constants exclusively, no existing result display implementation found</subtitle>

    <fact>ANNOUNCE_SCALE constant value 1.25, ANNOUNCE_TIME constant value 0.18 seconds, both used only within PlayLandAnnounce method</fact>
    <fact>Current animation tweens m_segmentNodes[landIndex] scale from 1 to 1.25 (backOut easing) then back to 1 (backIn easing) over 0.36 seconds total</fact>
    <fact>m_segmentNodes array defined at line 81, accessed at line 372 for animation, validated at lines 417-418 for correct segment count</fact>
    <fact>No existing HIDE_RESULT or HideResult implementation found in assets directory</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Investigation mapped the current wheel landing animation architecture in FeatureWheelManager.ts. PlayLandAnnounce is the sole landing animation method, called once during the wheel stop sequence with BC-7 contract annotation (promise must resolve after animation completes). The method uses two private constants (ANNOUNCE_SCALE=1.25, ANNOUNCE_TIME=0.18) that have no other consumers, making them safe candidates for removal if the animation is replaced. The animation operates on m_segmentNodes array elements, performing a scale bounce (1→1.25→1) over 0.36 seconds total using Cocos v3 tween API with backOut/backIn easing. No pre-existing result display or hide mechanism was found, confirming this is new territory for the temporary FeatureWheelResult implementation. This investigation establishes clean boundaries for replacement: ANNOUNCE_SCALE/TIME can be removed, PlayLandAnnounce signature must be preserved for BC-7 contract, and m_segmentNodes access pattern at line 372 shows where landIndex maps to visual elements.</narrative>

    break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 輕量落點演出：目標格高亮 {\\n            const node = this.m_segmentNodes[landIndex];\\n            if (!node || !node.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const s = 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 緩解：驗節點數量，順序語意仍須人工核對 prefab）\\n     */\\n    private warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：落點節點數 ${this.m_segmentNodes.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 方法\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前轉動落點索引（每次轉動 +1 循環 input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查測試按鍵，走真實 eventManager 事件路徑驗證 FeatureWheel 功能\\n     * DIGIT_1：初始化 + 設定預設輪盤資料 + 顯示 UI（一鍵就緒）\\n     * DIGIT_2：轉動到下一格（循環 0~11）並印出落點結果（驗證旋轉/落點演出/callback）\\n     * DIGIT_3：重設隨機輪盤資料（驗證 icon 與乘倍數值動態更新）\\n     * DIGIT_4：切換顯示/隱藏 UI\\n     */\\n    private CheckTestKeyCode(event: EventKeyboard) {\\n        switch (event.keyCode) {\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_1:\\n                log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 初始化 + 設定預設資料 + 顯示 UI');\\n                // INIT 僅需非 null 物件以通過參數驗證並翻起 m_isInit；\\n   });\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_3:\\n                log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 重設隨機輪盤資料');\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, this.BuildRandomTestSegments());\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_4:\\n                this.m_testUIShown = * @ch Feature Wheel 輪盤 UI 元件\\n * 單一職責：顯示 12 格、平時 Idle 緩轉、依 server 資料換 icon、轉動落在指定格、播落點演出、把選中功能拋給外部\\n * 不碰盤面標記/重轉/改符號（呼叫端責任）\\n */\\n@ccclass('FeatureWheelManager')\\nexport class FeatureWheelManager extends Component {\\n    //#region 屬性\\n    /**@ch 根節點（顯示/隱藏）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '根節點' })\\n    private m_rootNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 輪盤旋轉節點（轉動的是這個，頂端指針固定不動）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '輪盤旋轉節點' })\\n    private m_wheelNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格 icon 的 SpriteChange（順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [SpriteChange], displayName: 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n    /**@ch 落點演出放大倍率*/\\n    private static readonly ANNOUNCE_SCALE = 1.25;\\n    /**@ch 落點演出單段時間（秒）*/\\n    private static readonly ANNOUNCE_TIME = 0.18;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 輕量落點演出：目標格高亮 + scale 彈一下，演出完成才 resolve（BC-7）\\n     * 預留接口：未來可在此依 type 改播專屬 Spine 演出\\n     */\\n    private PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            const node = this.m_segmentNodes[landIndex];\\n            if (!node || !node.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const s = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_SCALE;\\n            const t = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_TIME;\\n            tween(node)\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(s, s, s) }, { easing: 'backOut' })\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(1, 1, 1) }, { easing: 'backIn' })\\n                .call(() => resolve())\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 content.thinking:
The user is editing FeatureWheelManager.ts to remove the `v3` import from the Cocos imports. This is preparation work - they're removing the `v3` function that was used in the old scale bounce animation since they're planning to replace that animation approach.

This is a refactor/change - removing an unused import after deciding to replace the animation implementation.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>refactor</type>
  <title>Remove v3 import in preparation for animation replacement</title>
  <subtitle>Removed v3 from Cocos imports as part of replacing scale bounce animation with FeatureWheelResult display</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Removed v3 import from cc module import statement in FeatureWheelManager.ts line 1</fact>
    <fact>v3 function was previously used only in PlayLandAnnounce method for scale tween (lines 380-381)</fact>
    <fact>Import removal indicates animation implementation is being replaced</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Removed the v3 vector helper import from FeatureWheelManager.ts as part of refactoring the wheel landing animation. The v3 function was exclusively used in PlayLandAnnounce method to create scale vectors for the bounce animation (scale to v3(1.25, 1.25, 1.25) then back to v3(1, 1, 1)). Removing this import is preparatory work for replacing the scale bounce animation with a FeatureWheelResult prefab display approach. This cleanup follows the earlier investigation that confirmed v3 had no other consumers in the file, making it safe to remove once the animation code is rewritten.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 輕量落點演出：目標格高亮 + scale 彈一下，演出完成才 resolve（BC-7）\\n     * 預留接口：未來可在此依 type 改播專屬 Spine 演出\\n     */\\n    private PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            const node = this.m_segmentNodes[landIndex];\\n            if (!node || !node.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const s = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_SCALE;\\n            const t = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_TIME;\\n            tween(node)\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(s, s, s) }, { easing: 'backOut' })\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(1, 1, 1) }, { easing: 'backIn' })\\n                .call(() => resolve())\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 緩解：驗節點數量，順序語意仍須人工核對 prefab）\\n     */\\n    private DevAssertConfig() {\\n        if (!DEV) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：SpriteChange 數 ${this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentNodes.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：落點節點數 ${this.m_segmentNodes.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 方法\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前轉動落點索引（每次轉動 +1 循環 0~11）*/\\n    private m_testLandIndex = 0;\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前 UI 顯示狀態（給 DIGIT_4 切換）*/\\n    private m_testUIShown = false;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊測試按鍵（僅 DEBUG 構建生效；正式構建零副作用）\\n     */\\n    private RegisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // input.on(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取消註冊測試按鍵（與 RegisterTestKeyCodes 對稱，避免監聽洩漏）\\n     */\\n    private UnregisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查測試按鍵，走真實 eventManager 事件路徑驗證 FeatureWheel 功能\\n     * DIGIT_1：初始化 + 設定預設輪盤資料 + 顯示 UI（一鍵就緒）\\n     * DIGIT_2：轉動到下一格（循環 0~11）並印出落點結果（驗證旋轉/落點演出/callback）\\n     * DIGIT_3：重設隨機輪盤資料（驗證 icon 與乘倍數值動態更新）\\n     * DIGIT_4：切換顯示/隱藏 UI\\n     */\\n    private CheckTestKeyCode(event: EventKeyboard) {\\n        switch (event.keyCode) {\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_1:\\n                log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 初始化 + 設定預設資料 + 顯示 UI');\\n                // INIT 僅需非 null 物件以通過參數驗證並翻起 m_isInit；\\n                // m_gameView 在本元件未被讀取，測試以 this.node 佔位即可\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT, this.node);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, GetDefaultSegments());\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_2: {\\n                const landIndex = this.m_testLandIndex % FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT;\\n                this.m_testLandIndex++;\\n                log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 轉動到第 ${landIndex} 格`);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN, landIndex, (result: SpinResult) => {\\n                    log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 落點結果 index=${result.index} type=${result.type}`);\\n                });\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_3:\\n                log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 重設隨機輪盤資料');\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, this.BuildRandomTestSegments());\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_4:\\n                this.m_testUIShown = !this.m_testUIShown;\\n                log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 切換 UI 顯示 → ${this.m_testUIShown}`);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(this.m_testUIShown ? content.thinking: This edit adds a new event HIDE_RESULT to the FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT constant. The comment indicates this is for hiding the result display card (FeatureWheelResult prefab) after PlayLandAnnounce shows it. This is implementing the event-driven exit approach discussed - where the display card is shown but not automatically hidden, requiring the caller to dispatch HIDE_RESULT event to dismiss it.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Add HIDE_RESULT event for result display card dismissal</title>
  <subtitle>New event FEATURE_WHEEL_HIDE_RESULT enables caller-controlled dismissal of FeatureWheelResult display after landing announcement completes</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Added HIDE_RESULT event constant with value 'FEATURE_WHEEL_HIDE_RESULT' to FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT namespace</fact>
    <fact>Event purpose is hiding result display card after PlayLandAnnounce shows it and immediately resolves</fact>
    <fact>Caller must dispatch this event to dismiss result display after presentation completes, following same pattern as RESUME_IDLE for manual control</fact>
    <fact>Documentation states PlayLandAnnounce will show display card then resolve without auto-hiding, delegating dismissal to caller</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Implemented new HIDE_RESULT event as part of the event-driven architecture for the FeatureWheelResult display card feature. This event follows the established pattern where PlaySpin completes its core work (rotation + announcement) but delegates subsequent UI state transitions to the caller. Just as RESUME_IDLE allows the caller to restart idle rotation after other board presentations complete, HIDE_RESULT allows the caller to dismiss the result display card when appropriate. The design decouples the wheel's landing announcement from the broader game flow, letting the caller coordinate multiple animations and displays. The event constant is defined in FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT namespace alongside existing events like RESUME_IDLE, maintaining consistency with the established event-driven control pattern.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

= false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 輕量落點演出：目標格高亮 {\\n            const node = this.m_segmentNodes[landIndex];\\n            if (!node || !node.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const s = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_SCALE;\\n            const t = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_TIME;\\n            tween(node)\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(s, s, s) }, { easing: 'backOut' })\\n content.thinking:
This edit adds two new properties for the result display card:
1. m_resultNode - the root node of the result display card
2. m_resultSpriteChange - the SpriteChange component for the result symbol

It also updates the comment for m_segmentNodes to clarify it's now only used for DevAssertConfig validation, as the landing animation is being replaced with the result display card.

The key points:
- Result node for showing/hiding the display card
- Result sprite change uses same index mapping as the 12 segment icons (TYPE_ICON_CONFIG)
- The old m_segmentNodes array is being deprecated for animation but kept for validation
- HIDE_RESULT event will control the dismissal

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Add result display card properties for landing announcement</title>
  <subtitle>Added m_resultNode and m_resultSpriteChange properties to replace scale bounce animation with FeatureWheelResult prefab display</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Added m_resultNode property of type Node for result display card root node with displayName '結果展示牌根節點'</fact>
    <fact>Added m_resultSpriteChange property of type SpriteChange for result symbol sprite with displayName '結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange'</fact>
    <fact>Result sprite change uses same 5-sprite index mapping as TYPE_ICON_CONFIG, matching the 12 segment icon indexing system</fact>
    <fact>Updated m_segmentNodes comment to indicate it is now only used for DevAssertConfig validation, landing animation replaced with result display card</fact>
    <fact>Result display card dismissal will be controlled by HIDE_RESULT event as documented in property comment</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Implemented the property infrastructure for the FeatureWheelResult display card feature, adding two Cocos @property decorated fields that will be wired in the scene editor. The m_resultNode serves as the root container for show/hide control, while m_resultSpriteChange provides the sprite swapping capability using the same TypeToIconIndex mapping that the existing 12 segment icons use. This design choice enables code reuse since both the wheel segments and result display share the same 5-sprite asset set (FreeGame, Multiplier, Upgrade, SymbolConvert, GrandJP). The original m_segmentNodes array is being deprecated for animation purposes but retained for DevAssertConfig validation, maintaining backward compatibility with the existing prefab structure while transitioning to the new display approach. The properties follow the established pattern where root nodes control visibility and child components (SpriteChange) handle content updates.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

}\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12   const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉\\n     * PlaySpin 後輪盤停住不自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束，由呼叫端 dispatch 此事件才繼續緩轉\\n     */\\n    RESUME_IDLE: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_RESUME_IDLE',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 隱藏結果展示牌（暫代落點演出的退場）\\n     * PlayLandAnnounce 秀出展示牌後即 resolve、不自動收；由呼叫端在結果演出結束後 dispatch 此事件退場\\n     */\\n    HIDE_RESULT: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_HIDE_RESULT',\\n};\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch Feature Wheel 輪盤 UI 元件\\n * 單一職責：顯示 12 格、平時 Idle 緩轉、依 server 資料換 icon、轉動落在指定格、播落點演出、把選中功能拋給外部\\n * 不碰盤面標記/重轉/改符號（呼叫端責任）\\n */\\n@ccclass('FeatureWheelManager')\\nexport class FeatureWheelManager extends Component {\\n    //#region 屬性\\n    /**@ch 根節點（顯示/隱藏）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '根節點' })\\n    private m_rootNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 輪盤旋轉節點（轉動的是這個，頂端指針固定不動）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '輪盤旋轉節點' })\\n    private m_wheelNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格 icon 的 SpriteChange（順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [SpriteChange], displayName: '12 格 icon SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_segmentSpriteChanges: SpriteChange[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格乘倍數值 Label（非乘倍格留空字串；順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Label], displayName: '12 格乘倍數值 Label' })\\n    private m_segmentValueLabels: Label[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格落點演出節點（順序對應格 0~11；現僅供 DevAssertConfig 數量檢查，落點演出已改用結果展示牌）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Node], displayName: '12 格落點演出節點' })\\n    private m_segmentNodes: Node[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌根節點（暫代落點演出：顯示落點 feature 符號；退場由 HIDE_RESULT 事件觸發）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '結果展示牌根節點' })\\n    private m_resultNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange（5 張圖索引對齊 TYPE_ICON_CONFIG，與 12 格 icon 同套索引）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultSpriteChange: SpriteChange = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 轉動方向：勾選=順時針，取消=逆時針（預設順時針）*/\\n    @property({ displayName: '順時針轉動' })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 輕量落點演出：目標格高亮 + scale 彈一下，演出完成才 resolve（BC-7）\\n     * 預留接口：未來可在此依 type 改播專屬 Spine 演出\\n     */\\n    private PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            const node = this.m_segmentNodes[landIndex];\\n            if (!node || !node.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const s = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_SCALE;\\n            const t = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_TIME;\\n            tween(node)\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(s, s, s) }, { easing: 'backOut' })\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(1, 1, 1) }, { easing: 'backIn' })\\n                .call(() => resolve())\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 緩解：驗節點數量，順序語意仍須人工核對 prefab）\\n     */\\n    private DevAssertConfig() {\\n        if (!DEV) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：SpriteChange 數 ${this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentNodes.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：落點節點數 ${this.m_segmentNodes.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 方法\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前轉動落點索引（每次轉動 +1 循環 0~11）*/\\n    private m_testLandIndex = 0;\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前 UI 顯示狀態（給 DIGIT_4 切換）*/\\n    private m_testUIShown = false;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊測試按鍵（僅 DEBUG 構建生效；正式構建零副作用）\\n     */\\n    private RegisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // input.on(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取消註冊測試按鍵（與 RegisterTestKeyCodes 對稱，避免監聽洩漏）\\n     */\\n    private UnregisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查測試按鍵，走真實 eventManager 事件路徑驗證 FeatureWheel 功能\\n     * DIGIT_1：初始化 + 設定預設輪盤資料 + 顯示 UI（一鍵就緒）\\n     * DIGIT_2：轉動到下一格（循環 0~11）並印出落點結果（驗證旋轉/落點演出/callback）\\n     * DIGIT_3：重設隨機輪盤資料（驗證 icon 與乘倍數值動態更新）\\n     * DIGIT_4：切換顯示/隱藏 UI\\n     */\\n    private CheckTestKeyCode(event: EventKeyboard) {\\n        switch (event.keyCode) {\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_1:\\n                log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 初始化 + 設定預設資料 + 顯示 UI');\\n                // INIT 僅需非 null 物件以通過參數驗證並翻起 m_isInit；\\n                // m_gameView 在本元件未被讀取，測試以 this.node 佔位即可\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT, this.node);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, GetDefaultSegments());\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_2: {\\n                const landIndex = this.m_testLandIndex % FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT;\\n                this.m_testLandIndex++;\\n                log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 轉動到第 ${landIndex} 格`);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN, landIndex, (result: SpinResult) => {\\n                    log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 落點結果 index=${result.index} type=${result.type}`);\\n                });\\n                break;\\n            }\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_3:\\n                log('[FeatureWheel 測試] 重設隨機輪盤資料');\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA, this.BuildRandomTestSegments());\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_4:\\n                this.m_testUIShown = !this.m_testUIShown;\\n                log(`[FeatureWheel 測試] 切換 UI 顯示 → ${this.m_testUIShown}`);\\n                eventManager.Dispatch(this.m_testUIShown ? FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI : FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI);\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 產生 12 格隨機測試資料（type 隨機）\\n     */\\n    private BuildRandomTestSegments(): SegmentDescriptor[] {\\n        const types = [\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP,\\n            FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame,\\n        ];\\n        const segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const type = types[Math.floor(Math.random() * types.length)];\\n            segments.push({ type });\\n        }\\n        return segments;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 測試功能\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":225,\"oldLines\":6,\"newStart\":225,\"newLines\":10,\"lines\":[\"             case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\",\"                 this.ResumeIdle();\",\"                 break;\",\"+\",\"+            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\",\"+                this.HideResult();\",\"+                break;\",\"         }\",\"     }\",\"     //#endregion 事件註冊\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

content.thinking:
Two edits in quick succession:

1. First edit removed ANNOUNCE_SCALE and ANNOUNCE_TIME constants - these were used in the old scale bounce animation and are no longer needed since that animation is being replaced.

2. Second edit added HIDE_RESULT to the EVENT_LIST array - this ensures the HIDE_RESULT event is registered with the event manager so it can be dispatched and handled.

Both are cleanup/infrastructure changes supporting the transition from scale bounce to result display card.

<observation>
  <type>refactor</type>
  <title>Remove unused animation constants and register HIDE_RESULT event</title>
  <subtitle>Deleted ANNOUNCE_SCALE and ANNOUNCE_TIME constants no longer needed after removing scale bounce animation, added HIDE_RESULT to EVENT_LIST for event registration</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Removed ANNOUNCE_SCALE constant with value 1.25 previously used for scale bounce animation</fact>
    <fact>Removed ANNOUNCE_TIME constant with value 0.18 seconds previously used for animation duration</fact>
    <fact>Added FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT to EVENT_LIST array at line 133 for event manager registration</fact>
    <fact>EVENT_LIST now contains 7 events including new HIDE_RESULT event</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completed cleanup of orphaned animation constants and wired up the new HIDE_RESULT event into the event registration system. The ANNOUNCE_SCALE and ANNOUNCE_TIME constants were exclusively used by the old PlayLandAnnounce scale bounce animation that is being replaced with the FeatureWheelResult display card, making them dead code. Removing these constants eliminates unused code and confirms the animation approach is changing. Adding HIDE_RESULT to EVENT_LIST ensures the event manager properly registers this event during onLoad lifecycle, allowing the event dispatcher to route HIDE_RESULT events to the OnEvent handler. This follows the established pattern where all FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT constants must appear in EVENT_LIST for the forEach registration loop to wire them up correctly.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
