}\",\"originalFile\":\"import { _decorator, Component, Node, Label, tween, warn, error, EventKeyboard, Input, input, KeyCode, log } from 'cc';\\nimport { DEV, DEBUG } from 'cc/env';\\nimport GameView from '../GameView';\\nimport { eventManager } from 'db://astarte-framework/Managers';\\nimport { SpriteChange } from '../Common/SpriteChange';\\nimport {\\n    SegmentDescriptor,\\n    SpinResult,\\n    FeatureWheelSegmentType,\\n    FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT,\\n    TypeToIconIndex,\\n    ComputeTargetAngle,\\n    NormalizeAngle,\\n    GetDefaultSegments,\\n} from './FeatureWheelTypes';\\n\\nconst { ccclass, property } = _decorator;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch Feature Wheel 事件（獨立命名空間，與舊 MULTIPLIER_EVENT 不衝突，支援共存）\\n */\\nexport const FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT = {\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化\\n     * @param gameView 遊戲視窗\\n     */\\n    INIT: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_INIT',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格輪盤資料（server 給）\\n     * @param segments SegmentDescriptor[]（每格 type；None 格不顯示）\\n     */\\n    SET_WHEEL_DATA: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_SET_WHEEL_DATA',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback (選填) (result: SpinResult) => void\\n     */\\n    PLAY_SPIN: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_PLAY_SPIN',\\n\\n    /**@ch 顯示 UI*/\\n    SHOW_UI: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW_UI',\\n\\n    /**@ch 隱藏 UI*/\\n    HIDE_UI: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_HIDE_UI',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉\\n     * PlaySpin 後輪盤停住不自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束，由呼叫端 dispatch 此事件才繼續緩轉\\n     */\\n    RESUME_IDLE: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_RESUME_IDLE',\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 隱藏結果展示牌（暫代落點演出的退場）\\n     * PlayLandAnnounce 秀出展示牌後即 resolve、不自動收；由呼叫端在結果演出結束後 dispatch 此事件退場\\n     */\\n    HIDE_RESULT: 'FEATURE_WHEEL_HIDE_RESULT',\\n};\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch Feature Wheel 輪盤 UI 元件\\n * 單一職責：顯示 12 格、平時 Idle 緩轉、依 server 資料換 icon、轉動落在指定格、播落點演出、把選中功能拋給外部\\n * 不碰盤面標記/重轉/改符號（呼叫端責任）\\n */\\n@ccclass('FeatureWheelManager')\\nexport class FeatureWheelManager extends Component {\\n    //#region 屬性\\n    /**@ch 根節點（顯示/隱藏）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '根節點' })\\n    private m_rootNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 輪盤旋轉節點（轉動的是這個，頂端指針固定不動）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '輪盤旋轉節點' })\\n    private m_wheelNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格 icon 的 SpriteChange（順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [SpriteChange], displayName: '12 格 icon SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_segmentSpriteChanges: SpriteChange[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格乘倍數值 Label（非乘倍格留空字串；順序對應格 0~11）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Label], displayName: '12 格乘倍數值 Label' })\\n    private m_segmentValueLabels: Label[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 12 格落點演出節點（順序對應格 0~11；現僅供 DevAssertConfig 數量檢查，落點演出已改用結果展示牌）*/\\n    @property({ type: [Node], displayName: '12 格落點演出節點' })\\n    private m_segmentNodes: Node[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌根節點（暫代落點演出：顯示落點 feature 符號；退場由 HIDE_RESULT 事件觸發）*/\\n    @property({ type: Node, displayName: '結果展示牌根節點' })\\n    private m_resultNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange（5 張圖索引對齊 TYPE_ICON_CONFIG，與 12 格 icon 同套索引）*/\\n    @property({ type: SpriteChange, displayName: '結果展示牌符號 SpriteChange' })\\n    private m_resultSpriteChange: SpriteChange = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 轉動方向：勾選=順時針，取消=逆時針（預設順時針）*/\\n    @property({ displayName: '順時針轉動' })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 輕量落點演出：目標格高亮 + scale 彈一下，演出完成才 resolve（BC-7）\\n     * 預留接口：未來可在此依 type 改播專屬 Spine 演出\\n     */\\n    private PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            const node = this.m_segmentNodes[landIndex];\\n            if (!node || !node.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const s = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_SCALE;\\n            const t = FeatureWheelManager.ANNOUNCE_TIME;\\n            tween(node)\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(s, s, s) }, { easing: 'backOut' })\\n                .to(t, { scale: v3(1, 1, 1) }, { easing: 'backIn' })\\n                .call(() => resolve())\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 緩解：驗節點數量，順序語意仍須人工核對 prefab）\\n     */\\n    private DevAssertConfig() {\\n        if (!DEV) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：SpriteChange 數 ${this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentNodes.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：落點節點數 ${this.m_segmentNodes.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 方法\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前轉動落點索引（每次轉動 +1 循環 0~11）*/\\n    private m_testLandIndex = 0;\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前 UI 顯示狀態（給 DIGIT_4 切換）*/\\n    private m_testUIShown = false;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊測試按鍵（僅 DEBUG 構建生效；正式構建零副作用）\\n     */\\n    private RegisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // input.on(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取消註冊測試按鍵（與 RegisterTestKeyCodes 對稱，避免監聽洩漏）\\n     */\\n    private UnregisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // content.thinking:
The user added a case in the OnEvent switch statement to handle FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT, which calls this.HideResult(). This is part of the event routing infrastructure - when the HIDE_RESULT event is dispatched through eventManager, it will be routed to this case and call the HideResult() method (which hasn't been implemented yet).

This is a feature addition - wiring up the event handler for the new HIDE_RESULT event.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Wire HIDE_RESULT event handler in OnEvent dispatcher</title>
  <subtitle>Added case statement routing HIDE_RESULT event to HideResult method in event dispatcher switch block</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Added FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT case to OnEvent switch statement at line 228</fact>
    <fact>Case routes to this.HideResult() method call which will be implemented next</fact>
    <fact>Follows same pattern as RESUME_IDLE case immediately above with simple method invocation, no parameter validation needed</fact>
    <fact>Completes event routing chain from EVENT_LIST registration through OnEvent dispatch to handler method</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Wired the HIDE_RESULT event into the OnEvent event dispatcher by adding a case statement that calls HideResult(). This completes the event infrastructure chain: HIDE_RESULT is defined as a constant, registered in EVENT_LIST for eventManager subscription, and now routed through the OnEvent switch to a handler method. The implementation follows the established pattern for parameter-less events like RESUME_IDLE, where the case simply calls a private method without argument validation. The HideResult() method itself hasn't been implemented yet but the routing infrastructure is ready. This pattern ensures all events flow through the same eventManager.Dispatch() → OnEvent() → method call path, maintaining consistency with other wheel events like SHOW_UI, HIDE_UI, and RESUME_IDLE.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n   const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n if (seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    this.m_resultSpriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n content.thinking:
This is a major implementation change. The user has replaced the entire PlayLandAnnounce method implementation - removing the scale bounce animation with tween and replacing it with the FeatureWheelResult display card approach. They've also implemented the HideResult method. Let me capture what changed:

1. **PlayLandAnnounce rewritten**: 
   - Old: scaled m_segmentNodes[landIndex] with tween using v3, ANNOUNCE_SCALE, ANNOUNCE_TIME
   - New: Shows m_resultNode, updates m_resultSpriteChange sprite based on segment type using TypeToIconIndex
   - BC-7 semantics changed: now resolves immediately after showing (not after animation completes)
   - Display card stays visible until HIDE_RESULT event

2. **HideResult implemented**: Simple method that sets m_resultNode.active = false

This is the core feature implementation - the temporary replacement for the landing animation.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Replace scale bounce animation with FeatureWheelResult display card</title>
  <subtitle>Rewrote PlayLandAnnounce to show result display card with landed feature symbol instead of scale bounce animation, implemented HideResult for event-driven dismissal</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>PlayLandAnnounce now retrieves landed segment from m_segments[landIndex] instead of accessing m_segmentNodes for animation</fact>
    <fact>Method updates m_resultSpriteChange using TypeToIconIndex matching BindSegmentIcons pattern, handles None type by clearing sprite</fact>
    <fact>Result display card shown by setting m_resultNode.active = true, then immediately resolves without waiting for animation completion</fact>
    <fact>BC-7 contract semantics adjusted: promise resolves after showing display card rather than after animation finishes, m_isSpinning releases while card still visible</fact>
    <fact>HideResult method implemented to set m_resultNode.active = false when HIDE_RESULT event dispatched by caller</fact>
    <fact>Removed all references to ANNOUNCE_SCALE, ANNOUNCE_TIME, v3, tween, and m_segmentNodes from PlayLandAnnounce implementation</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completed the core feature implementation by replacing the scale bounce animation with the FeatureWheelResult display card approach. The rewritten PlayLandAnnounce method now follows a completely different pattern: instead of tweening a segment node's scale over 0.36 seconds, it retrieves the landed segment data, updates the result card's sprite using the same TypeToIconIndex mapping that the wheel segments use (ensuring visual consistency), shows the card by activating m_resultNode, then immediately resolves. This changes BC-7's promise resolution semantics - the promise now signals "display card shown" rather than "animation completed," allowing PlaySpin to release m_isSpinning and invoke the callback while the result card remains visible. The caller must later dispatch HIDE_RESULT to dismiss the card, following the same manual control pattern as RESUME_IDLE for idle rotation. The HideResult handler is simple node visibility control. The implementation reuses existing utilities (TypeToIconIndex, FeatureWheelSegmentType.None handling) and follows the established guard pattern (null checks before operations). This temporary solution eliminates the old animation code entirely, paving the way for eventual replacement with proper Spine animations or other presentation improvements.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>trade-off</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

(let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    //   <title>Auto-hide result display card when hiding wheel UI</title>

  <facts>
    <fact>SetUIShow now calls this.HideResult() when isShow is false (hiding UI)</fact>
    <fact>Cleanup added before m_isIdle assignment to ensure result card hidden before state transitions</fact>
    <fact>Prevents scenario where result display card from previous spin remains visible when UI is shown again</fact>
    <fact>Follows defensive programming pattern similar to existing Idle state management on UI visibility changes</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Fixed a potential visual bug where the result display card could persist across UI show/hide cycles by adding automatic cleanup in SetUIShow. When HIDE_UI is dispatched, SetUIShow(false) now calls HideResult() to dismiss the result card before hiding the root node. This prevents the scenario where a result card from a previous spin remains visible (or appears immediately upon next show) because the caller forgot to dispatch HIDE_RESULT before hiding the overall UI. The fix mirrors the existing Idle rotation management pattern in SetUIShow: hiding the UI automatically stops idle rotation (m_isIdle = false), and now it also hides the result card. While the caller can still explicitly dispatch HIDE_RESULT at any time, this defensive cleanup ensures UI state consistency across show/hide cycles even if the caller's event sequencing is imperfect.</narrative>
